title: FLASHBACK — Mom on phone in cafe, smiling about Dad's stories
prompt: @young_Mama in the cafe corner at the marble window table, warm wood interior, brass pendants overhead, right hand HOLDS a mobile phone to her ear. Mouth LAUGHS softly, head TILTS back. Other hand TWIRLS hair playfully. Eyes WARM, big smile. Soft afternoon sun through the window, autumn leaves visible outside. young_Mama (soft, laughing): "Tell me about Germany again."
